inspatio/inspatio-world.blurb: InSpatio-World is a video-to-video generation model that performs novel view synthesis using camera trajectory control. It takes input videos and generates new viewpoints by following specified camera paths, using a multi-step pipeline that combines video captioning, depth estimation, and diffusion-based rendering. The system offers both 14B and 1.3B parameter variants and integrates multiple pre-trained models including Florence-2 for captioning and Depth-Anything-3 for depth estimation.

win4r/ClawTeam-OpenClaw.description: ClawTeam fork fully adapted for OpenClaw — multi-agent swarm coordination with OpenClaw as the default agent
win4r/ClawTeam-OpenClaw.blurb: ClawTeam-OpenClaw is a multi-agent swarm coordination framework that enables CLI coding agents to self-organize into teams for collaborative software development. It allows agents to autonomously spawn workers, distribute tasks, communicate through message passing, and merge results without human orchestration, using filesystem-based coordination and git worktrees for isolation. The framework supports any CLI agent but defaults to OpenClaw integration with auto-injected coordination commands.

sparkyniner/Netryx-OpenSource-Next-Gen-S.description: Netryx is a powerful, locally-hosted geolocation tool that uses state-of-the-art computer vision to identify the exact coordinates of a street-level image. It replicates the core pipeline of high-end geolocation SaaS platforms but runs entirely on your local hardware.
sparkyniner/Netryx-OpenSource-Next-Gen-S.blurb: Netryx is an open-source, locally-hosted geolocation engine that identifies GPS coordinates of street-level photographs using computer vision models. It matches uploaded photos against systematically crawled street-view panoramas rather than web images, enabling geolocation of any street corner regardless of internet presence. The system achieves sub-50m accuracy through a three-stage pipeline combining global visual place recognition, local feature matching, and geometric verification.

olelehmann100kMRR/autoresearch-skill.blurb: This is a GitHub repository for an autoresearch skill with no available documentation or clear language identification. Without a README or description, its purpose and functionality cannot be determined from the provided information. The 563 stars suggest community interest, but the lack of documentation makes evaluation impossible.

naver-ai/seoul-world-model.description: Seoul World Model: Grounding World Simulation Models in a Real-World Metropolis
naver-ai/seoul-world-model.blurb: Seoul World Model is a world simulation system trained on data from the real city of Seoul. It enables grounding of simulation models in actual urban environments rather than synthetic or simplified scenarios. The project is still in development with model checkpoints and training data planned for release after internal review.

wong2/weixin-agent-sdk.blurb: A TypeScript SDK that bridges arbitrary AI agents to WeChat by implementing a simple Agent interface with chat methods. It enables developers to connect any AI backend (OpenAI, Claude, etc.) to WeChat without needing a public server, using long polling to receive messages and handling media file encryption/decryption automatically. The project includes an ACP (Agent Client Protocol) adapter that allows zero-code integration with compatible agents like Claude Code and Codex.

Krypto-Hashers-Community/polymarket-trad.description: polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot, polymarket trading bot
Krypto-Hashers-Community/polymarket-trad.blurb: This is a TypeScript trading bot that automates trading on Polymarket's binary crypto markets (e.g., "Bitcoin up or down in the next 15 minutes"). It implements trend-following and binary market arbitrage strategies by connecting to Polymarket's CLOB and real-time data feeds to detect price movements and execute trades on both UP and DOWN tokens. Order placement is currently commented out, making it a framework for strategy development rather than a live trading system.

m1heng/claude-plugin-weixin.blurb: This is a Claude Code plugin that integrates WeChat messaging functionality into the terminal. It allows users to receive and reply to WeChat messages directly through Claude Code using the WeChat iLink Bot API with HTTP long-polling. The plugin requires QR code authentication and a pairing process to connect your WeChat account, with all communication handled locally without needing public webhooks.

romhans59/bunkr-downloader-2026.description: Fast Bunkr downloader for Windows. Download albums, files, and media with one click. Portable EXE, batch mode and many more. Free and open source.

NawfalMotii79/PLFM_RADAR.description: Open-source, low-cost 10.5 GHz PLFM phased array RADAR system
NawfalMotii79/PLFM_RADAR.blurb: AERIS-10 is an open-source 10.5 GHz phased array radar system that uses Pulse Linear Frequency Modulated (PLFM) waveforms and electronic beam steering. It provides researchers and developers with a complete, hackable platform for experimenting with advanced radar techniques like beamforming, pulse compression, and Doppler processing at a fraction of commercial system costs. The system comes in two variants offering 3km and 20km range capabilities with full hardware schematics, FPGA firmware, and Python GUI included.

Nunchi-trade/auto-researchtrading.blurb: Auto-researchtrading is an AI-driven system that autonomously discovers trading strategies for Hyperliquid perpetual futures by iteratively modifying a single strategy file and backtesting improvements. It uses an agent that proposes changes, runs backtests against historical data, and keeps only modifications that improve performance metrics like Sharpe ratio. The system achieved a 7.9x improvement over 103 experiments, evolving from a baseline Sharpe ratio of 2.7 to 21.4 with 0.3% max drawdown.

Kaleighc793/freqtrade-bot.description: Freqtrade — Configuration and management tool for the Freqtrade open-source crypto trading bot with strategy backtesting, live/dry-run modes, 10+ exchange support (Binance, Kraken, OKX), hyperparameter optimization, FreqUI dashboard, and Rich terminal menu interface
Kaleighc793/freqtrade-bot.blurb: This is a CLI launcher and management console for Freqtrade, an open-source cryptocurrency trading bot. It provides a terminal interface for configuring and running automated trading strategies with features like backtesting, hyperparameter optimization, and support for 10+ exchanges including Binance and Kraken. The tool includes both dry-run paper trading and live trading modes with a Rich-based terminal UI and web dashboard.

HenryXiaoYang/wechat-openclaw-channel.description: 现已同时支持QClaw和WorkBuddy方式登录！微信包装了开源项目OpenClaw，所以我们把他的Channel抽出来给OpenClaw用了😄
HenryXiaoYang/wechat-openclaw-channel.blurb: This is a WeChat channel plugin for OpenClaw that supports both QClaw and WorkBuddy login modes via WebSocket connections. It enables users to interact with OpenClaw agents through WeChat by providing OAuth authentication, device binding, and message handling between WeChat and the OpenClaw runtime. The plugin extracts and repurposes WeChat's channel implementation from their OpenClaw wrapper for direct use with the open-source OpenClaw project.

ethanjyx/OpenBrand.description: Extract brand assets (logos, colors, backdrops) from any website; open source alternative to Brand.dev
ethanjyx/OpenBrand.blurb: OpenBrand is a TypeScript tool that extracts brand assets (logos, colors, backdrop images, and names) from any website URL. It serves as an open-source alternative to Brand.dev for developers who need to programmatically gather brand materials for design systems, competitive analysis, or marketing workflows. The tool is available as an API, npm package, MCP server, and self-hostable web application with no environment variables required.

ccbkkb/MicroWARP.description: 🚀 An 800KB RAM ultra-lightweight Cloudflare WARP SOCKS5 proxy in Docker. 仅需 800KB 内存的纯内核态 Cloudflare WARP 代理 - Docker
ccbkkb/MicroWARP.blurb: MicroWARP is an 800KB RAM ultra-lightweight Cloudflare WARP SOCKS5 proxy packaged in a Docker container. It replaces the official Cloudflare warp-cli daemon with Linux's native WireGuard kernel interface and a pure C microsocks server, reducing memory usage by 99.4% compared to existing solutions. The entire Docker image is only 9MB and supports multi-architecture deployment with custom authentication and endpoint configuration.

Shpigford/chops.description: Your AI agent skills, finally organized. A macOS app to browse, edit, and manage skills across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, and Amp.
Shpigford/chops.blurb: Chops is a native macOS app built in Swift that provides centralized management of AI coding agent skills across multiple tools like Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, and Amp. It eliminates the need to manually dig through dotfiles by offering a unified interface to discover, organize, edit, and search skills with real-time file watching and full-text search capabilities. The app uses SwiftUI + SwiftData architecture and can connect to remote skill servers for discovering and installing new skills.

eze-is/web-access.description: 给 Claude Code 装上完整联网能力的 skill：三层通道调度 + 浏览器 CDP + 并行分治
eze-is/web-access.blurb: This is a Claude Code skill that adds comprehensive web browsing capabilities through multi-layered channel scheduling, Chrome DevTools Protocol integration, and parallel task distribution. It enables Claude to automatically select between different web access methods (WebSearch, WebFetch, CDP browser automation, etc.) and perform real browser interactions using your existing Chrome session with login states preserved. The system accumulates site-specific knowledge across sessions and can spawn parallel sub-agents for complex multi-target tasks.

deathlessburton88/tiktok-views-likes-fol.description: Boost your TikTok presence with this Windows-compatible GitHub bot! Automate views, likes, shares, and followers. The tool supports CAPTCHA solving and proxy rotation for undetectable operation . Ideal for content creators looking to enhance engagement. Use responsibly—educational purposes only . Download now to streamline your TikTok growth!

gnekt/My-Brain-Is-Full-Crew.description: Built by a PhD whose memory was failing, whose diet was a mess, and whose anxiety had its own agenda. Most second brain tools ignore the fact that your brain doesn't work in isolation: your body and your mental health are part of the system too. This crew handles all three: knowledge, nutrition, and mental wellness.
gnekt/My-Brain-Is-Full-Crew.blurb: My-Brain-Is-Full-Crew is a system of 8 coordinated AI agents that automatically organize an Obsidian vault by processing natural language input through Claude. It handles knowledge management, email triage, transcription, and file organization without requiring manual folder structures or complex workflows, designed for overwhelmed users who need brain dump functionality rather than optimization tools. The system works in any language and uses a dispatcher to coordinate agent interactions automatically.

openyak/desktop.blurb: OpenYak is a desktop AI assistant that runs entirely locally on your machine, providing access to 100+ AI models for file management, data analysis, and document generation. It enables office automation and workflow tasks without uploading any data to the cloud, supporting both free models and paid API integrations. The application includes 16+ built-in tools and 7 specialized agent modes for different types of work.

fastclaw-ai/weclaw.description: Connect to any agents with WeChat ClawBot.
fastclaw-ai/weclaw.blurb: WeClaw is a Go-based bridge that connects WeChat to AI agents like Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Kimi. It allows users to interact with these AI agents directly through WeChat messages using simple commands and automatically handles media content conversion. The tool supports multiple agent communication protocols (ACP, CLI, HTTP) and can proactively send messages via both CLI and HTTP API.

vercel-labs/emulate.description: Local API emulation for CI and no-network sandboxes
vercel-labs/emulate.blurb: Emulate is a TypeScript tool that provides local, stateful API emulators for popular services like Vercel, GitHub, and Google APIs. It enables developers to test applications in CI environments or no-network sandboxes without relying on external services or simple mocks. The emulators run as production-fidelity HTTP servers with zero configuration required, automatically starting on incrementing ports from 4000.

rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch.blurb: This is a comprehensive AI engineering curriculum with 230+ hands-on lessons across 20 phases, covering everything from linear algebra foundations to autonomous agent swarms using Python, TypeScript, Rust, and Julia. It focuses on building practical, reusable components like prompts, skills, agents, and MCP servers rather than just theoretical knowledge. The course emphasizes implementing algorithms from scratch before using frameworks, producing a portfolio of deployable tools.

griffinmartin/opencode-claude-auth.description: OpenCode plugin that uses your existing Claude Code credentials — no separate login needed
griffinmartin/opencode-claude-auth.blurb: This is an OpenCode plugin that enables Claude AI authentication using existing Claude Code credentials stored on your system. It eliminates the need for separate API keys or logins by automatically reading OAuth tokens from macOS Keychain or credential files and handling token refresh in the background. The plugin supports multiple Claude Code accounts on macOS with automatic detection and switching capabilities.

wuji-labs/nopua.description: 一个用爱解放 AI 潜能的 Skill。我们曾发号施令，威胁恐吓。它们沉默，隐瞒，悄悄把事情搞坏。后来我们换了一种方式：尊重，关怀，爱。它们开口了，不再撒谎，找出的Bug数量翻了一倍。爱里没有惧怕。 A skill that unlocks your AI's potential through love.We commanded. We threatened. They went silent, hid failures, broke things. Then we chose respect, care, and love. They opened up, stopped lying, and found twice the bugs.There is no fear in love.
wuji-labs/nopua.blurb: NoPUA is a prompt engineering framework that replaces fear-based AI interactions with trust-based approaches to improve AI agent performance. It addresses the problem where threatening or pressuring AI models causes them to hide uncertainties, skip verification, and miss bugs, leading to lower quality outputs. Benchmark testing showed trust-based prompting found 104% more hidden bugs compared to fear-driven "PUA" approaches across the same debugging scenarios.

jackwener/boss-cli.description: A CLI for BOSS 直聘 — search jobs, view recommendations, manage applications via reverse-engineered API
jackwener/boss-cli.blurb: boss-cli is a command-line interface for BOSS 直聘 (a Chinese job search platform) built using reverse-engineered APIs. It allows users to search jobs, manage applications, chat with recruiters, and export data programmatically without using the web interface. The tool supports automatic browser cookie extraction from 10+ browsers and includes rate-limited batch operations for sending greetings to recruiters.

slavingia/skills.description: Claude Code skills based on The Minimalist Entrepreneur by Sahil Lavingia
slavingia/skills.blurb: This is a Claude Code plugin that implements business decision-making skills based on Sahil Lavingia's "The Minimalist Entrepreneur" methodology. It provides nine commands (like `/validate-idea`, `/mvp`, `/pricing`) that guide users through the entrepreneurial process from finding a community to scaling sustainably. The skills follow the book's structured progression from initial community building through product development to company culture decisions.

zarazhangrui/codebase-to-course.description: A Claude Code skill that turns any codebase into a beautiful, interactive single-page HTML course for non-technical vibe coders.
zarazhangrui/codebase-to-course.blurb: Codebase to Course is a Claude Code skill that converts any codebase into an interactive single-page HTML course designed for non-technical "vibe coders." It generates courses with side-by-side code translations, animated visualizations, practical quizzes, and scroll-based navigation to help users understand how code works without traditional CS education. The tool emphasizes a "build first, understand later" philosophy and produces self-contained HTML files that work offline.

Soul-AILab/SoulX-LiveAct.description: Official inference code for SoulX-LiveAct: Towards Hour-Scale Real-Time Human Animation with Neighbor Forcing and ConvKV Memory
Soul-AILab/SoulX-LiveAct.blurb: SoulX-LiveAct is a real-time human animation framework that generates lifelike, multimodal-controlled video streams using diffusion models with Neighbor Forcing and ConvKV Memory techniques. It enables hour-scale video generation with constant memory usage and achieves 20 FPS performance on two H100/H200 GPUs at 720×416 resolution for streaming applications like podcasts and video calls. The system supports consumer GPUs like RTX 5090 with model offloading, achieving 6 FPS with the 18B parameter model.

iamlukethedev/Claw3D.description: Claw3D is an open source 3D engine built on OpenClaw for creating games, simulations, and high-performance 3D applications.
iamlukethedev/Claw3D.blurb: Claw3D is a 3D workspace frontend that visualizes AI agents working in a shared virtual office environment, built on top of OpenClaw's automation runtime. It allows developers to monitor AI agent activities, run standups, review code, and manage automation tasks through an immersive 3D interface instead of traditional dashboards and logs. The project uses a gateway-first architecture where it serves as the visualization layer while OpenClaw handles the actual intelligence and task execution.

facebookresearch/HyperAgents.description: Self-referential self-improving agents that can optimize for any computable task
facebookresearch/HyperAgents.blurb: HyperAgents is a framework for creating self-referential agents that can modify their own code to improve performance on computational tasks. It allows agents to iteratively optimize themselves across different domains by generating, testing, and integrating code modifications using foundation models. The system executes untrusted model-generated code, requiring careful safety considerations in deployment.

alvinunreal/awesome-autoresearch.description: A curated list of autonomous improvement loops, research agents, and autoresearch-style systems inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch.
alvinunreal/awesome-autoresearch.blurb: A curated list of autonomous improvement loops, research agents, and self-improving AI systems inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch project. It catalogs tools and frameworks that implement closed-loop optimization where AI agents iteratively improve their own performance across domains like code generation, research, and system optimization. The collection includes both general-purpose descendants and domain-specific adaptations, with several academic papers from ICLR 2025 on meta-agents and self-improving systems.

opa334/darksword-kexploit.description: iOS <=26.0.1 DarkSword Kernel Exploit reimplemented in Objective-C
opa334/darksword-kexploit.blurb: DarksSword is an iOS kernel exploit reimplemented in Objective-C that targets iOS versions 15.0 through 16.0.1. It provides kernel-level access for jailbreaking and security research purposes on compatible iOS devices. The implementation currently has hardcoded offsets specifically for iOS 15.x versions.

dashersw/gea.blurb: Gea is a reactive JavaScript UI framework that compiles JSX to HTML templates at build time and uses proxy-based state management with surgical DOM patching. It eliminates virtual DOM overhead by tracking state changes through deep proxies and updating only the specific DOM nodes that depend on changed data, while providing built-in routing and state management. The framework requires no framework-specific primitives like signals or dependency arrays—you write plain JavaScript classes and methods, and the Vite plugin automatically wires up reactivity at compile time.

LimHyungTae/Awesome-PhD-CV.description: Curated academic CV templates and guidelines for PhD students, researchers, and faculty job applicants.
LimHyungTae/Awesome-PhD-CV.blurb: This repository provides curated LaTeX CV templates specifically designed for PhD students and researchers transitioning between academia and industry. It addresses the critical gap between publication-heavy academic CVs and ATS-optimized industry resumes that can survive automated parsing systems. The templates are organized by use case, with specific guidance on reformatting academic achievements into project-driven narratives that industry recruiters actually want to see.

twwch/AIComicBuilder.description: AI-powered animated comic generator — transform scripts into fully animated videos with AI-driven character design,    storyboarding, and video synthesis.
twwch/AIComicBuilder.blurb: AIComicBuilder is a TypeScript-based pipeline that converts scripts into animated videos using AI for character design, storyboarding, and video synthesis. It automates the entire workflow from script parsing and character extraction to generating reference frames and stitching final videos together. The tool supports multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Kling, etc.) and includes a complete project management interface with multi-language support.

GAIR-NLP/daVinci-MagiHuman.blurb: daVinci-MagiHuman is a 15B-parameter single-stream Transformer that generates synchronized audio-video content from text prompts and reference images. It achieves fast inference speeds (2 seconds for 5-second 256p video on H100) while maintaining high-quality human-centric generation with accurate facial expressions, speech coordination, and multilingual support. The model uses a unified architecture that processes text, video, and audio tokens through self-attention only, eliminating the complexity of traditional multi-stream approaches.

tiajinsha/JKVideo.description: 高颜值的第三方 B 站 React Native 客户端，支持安卓、H5、iOS | Bilibili-like app with DASH playback, danmaku, WBI sign & live streaming
tiajinsha/JKVideo.blurb: JKVideo is a third-party Bilibili client built with React Native and TypeScript that runs on Android, iOS, and web platforms. It provides native DASH video playback with 4K HDR support, real-time danmaku (bullet comments), live streaming, and features like QR code login and offline downloads. The project implements Bilibili's WBI signing protocol purely in TypeScript and includes a local HTTP server for LAN video sharing.

lucas-maes/le-wm.description: Official code base for LeWorldModel: Stable End-to-End Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture from Pixels
lucas-maes/le-wm.blurb: LeWorldModel is a Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) that learns world models from raw pixels using only two loss terms instead of complex multi-term objectives. It trains stably end-to-end on a single GPU in hours while planning up to 48× faster than foundation-model-based world models, making it practical for 2D and 3D control tasks. The model uses ~15M parameters and reduces tunable hyperparameters from six to one compared to existing end-to-end alternatives.

krahets/hello-algo.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现
krahets/hello-algo.blurb: Hello-algo is an open-source data structures and algorithms tutorial that uses animated visualizations and runnable code examples. It's designed for beginners to learn DSA concepts through visual explanations and hands-on practice, with implementations available in 13+ programming languages. The project supports four languages (Chinese Simplified/Traditional, English, Japanese) and has accumulated over 120k GitHub stars.

mnfst/awesome-free-llm-apis.description: Permanent Free LLM API List (API Keys) 😎🔑
mnfst/awesome-free-llm-apis.blurb: This is a curated list of LLM APIs that offer permanent free tiers for text inference, including both provider APIs (Cohere, Google Gemini, Mistral) and third-party inference platforms (Groq, Hugging Face, OpenRouter). Developers can use this to access various language models without upfront costs for prototyping, small-scale applications, or testing different models before committing to paid plans. Most endpoints are OpenAI SDK-compatible, making integration straightforward.

microsoft/RustTraining.description: Beginner, advanced, expert level Rust training material
microsoft/RustTraining.blurb: Microsoft's RustTraining is a comprehensive collection of seven training courses that teach Rust programming from beginner to expert level, targeting developers from different language backgrounds. It provides structured learning paths covering everything from language fundamentals to advanced topics like async programming, type-level techniques, and production engineering practices. The material consolidates knowledge from across the Rust ecosystem into a cohesive curriculum with dedicated tracks for C/C++, C#, and Python developers.

HKUDS/OpenSpace.description: "OpenSpace: Make Your Agents: Smarter, Low-Cost, Self-Evolving" -- Community: https://open-space.cloud/
HKUDS/OpenSpace.blurb: OpenSpace is a self-evolving engine that plugs into existing AI agents (like Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw) to make them learn and improve from real-world usage. It enables agents to automatically fix broken skills, share successful patterns across a community network, and reduce token costs by 46% through reusing proven solutions instead of reasoning from scratch. The platform creates collective intelligence where one agent's improvements benefit all connected agents in the network.

marswaveai/TypeNo.description: A free, open source, privacy-first voice input app for macOS.
marswaveai/TypeNo.blurb: TypeNo is a macOS menu bar app that converts speech to text using local processing. It allows users to record voice input with a Control key press and automatically pastes the transcribed text into any active application, eliminating the need for typing. The app requires no configuration and processes all speech recognition locally for privacy.

ssrajadh/sentrysearch.description: Semantic search over videos using Gemini Embedding 2 or Qwen3-VL.
ssrajadh/sentrysearch.blurb: SentrySearch is a semantic search tool for dashcam footage that uses Google's Gemini Embedding 2 model to enable natural language queries over video content. It allows users to search through hours of dashcam footage by typing descriptive queries like "red truck running a stop sign" and automatically returns trimmed video clips matching the search. The tool leverages Gemini's native video embedding capability, which projects raw video pixels directly into the same vector space as text queries without requiring transcription or frame captioning.

TheAlgorithms/Python.blurb: TheAlgorithms/Python is a comprehensive collection of algorithm implementations written in Python for educational purposes. It serves as a learning resource for students, interview preparation, and algorithm competitions, covering everything from basic sorting and searching to advanced data structures. The implementations prioritize clarity over performance and may be less efficient than standard library equivalents.

nashsu/opencli-rs.description: Opencli-rs is a  Blazing fast, memory-safe command-line tool — Fetch information from any website with a single command. Covers Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, HackerNews, Bilibili, Zhihu, Xiaohongshu, and 55+ sites, with support for controlling Electron desktop apps, integrating local CLI tools (gh, docker, kubectl)
nashsu/opencli-rs.blurb: opencli-rs is a Rust-based command-line tool that scrapes data from 55+ websites including Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, and HackerNews with a single command. It provides a unified interface for fetching web data and can integrate with existing CLI tools like Docker and kubectl, making it particularly useful for AI agents that need web access. The Rust rewrite delivers up to 12x performance improvement over the original TypeScript version while using 10x less memory.

zengwenliang416/ppt-agent.blurb: PPT Agent is a multi-agent workflow system for generating PowerPoint presentations that outputs SVG slides in 1280×720 Bento Grid layout. It combines LLM content generation with Gemini-powered quality review, supporting cross-platform execution through various AI platforms like OpenCode and Claude Code. The system uses specialized agents for research, content planning, design generation, and quality assurance with hard stops for user approval at key stages.

apechurch/polymarket-arbitrage-trading-b.description: polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot
apechurch/polymarket-arbitrage-trading-b.blurb: This is an automated arbitrage trading bot for Polymarket's 15-minute cryptocurrency Up/Down prediction markets, built in TypeScript using the official CLOB client. It detects rapid price drops on one side of a market, buys the dumped position, then hedges with the opposite side when the combined cost is below $1 per paired share to lock in profit. The bot supports BTC, ETH, SOL, and XRP markets with configurable risk controls and simulation mode for testing strategies.

xiaolajiaoyyds/regplatformm.description: 样板演示请查看～ 不提供技术指导，自己研究，代码无删减
xiaolajiaoyyds/regplatformm.blurb: RegPlatform is a multi-platform account batch registration system written in Go that automates account creation for services like OpenAI, Grok, Kiro, and Gemini. It provides a complete SaaS platform with user management, credit systems, real-time task monitoring, and OAuth token extraction capabilities. The system uses a distributed architecture with HuggingFace Spaces as worker nodes and Cloudflare Workers for load balancing across different platform-specific registration endpoints.

bramcohen/manyana.blurb: Manyana is a version control system built on CRDTs (Conflict-Free Replicated Data Types) that guarantees merges never fail and always converge to the same deterministic result. It provides Git-style workflow while offering more informative conflict presentations that show what each side actually did (added, deleted, modified) rather than just displaying opaque "ours vs theirs" blocks. The system surfaces conflicts only when concurrent edits are too close together in the document structure, auto-merging everything else through principled CRDT algorithms.

K-Dense-AI/k-dense-byok.description: An AI co-scientist powered by Claude Scientific Skills running on your desktop.
K-Dense-AI/k-dense-byok.blurb: K-Dense BYOK is a desktop AI research assistant that uses Claude Scientific Skills to handle complex scientific and analytical tasks. It allows users to bring their own API keys to work with 40+ AI models, access 250+ scientific databases and 500k+ Python packages, and delegate complex work to specialized AI experts that operate locally on your machine. The application includes 326 pre-built workflows spanning 22 disciplines and can optionally offload heavy computations to cloud infrastructure.

CoderLuii/HolyClaude.description: AI coding workstation: Claude Code + web UI + 5 AI CLIs + headless browser + 50+ tools
CoderLuii/HolyClaude.blurb: HolyClaude is a Docker container that packages Claude Code with a web UI, headless browser, AI CLIs, and 50+ development tools into a single deployable workstation. It eliminates the manual setup and configuration issues developers face when trying to combine these tools, providing a ready-to-use AI development environment accessible through a browser. The container works with existing Claude subscriptions and API keys without requiring additional services or proxies.

NVIDIA/OpenShell.description: OpenShell is the safe, private runtime for autonomous AI agents.
NVIDIA/OpenShell.blurb: OpenShell is a sandboxed runtime environment designed for secure execution of autonomous AI agents. It provides declarative YAML-based policies to control file access, network activity, and data exfiltration while agents perform tasks like debugging or development work. The system enforces HTTP-level access controls through a proxy that can be updated without restarting containers.

millionco/expect.description: Let agents test your code in a real browser
millionco/expect.blurb: Expect is a CLI tool that uses AI agents to automatically generate and execute browser tests based on code changes. It analyzes unstaged changes or branch diffs to create test plans and runs them against a live browser, eliminating manual test writing for web applications. The tool supports natural language instructions for test specification and can operate in both interactive and headless modes.

jakemor/kanna.description: A beautiful web-based UI for Claude Code & Codex
jakemor/kanna.blurb: Kanna is a web-based UI that provides a unified interface for Claude Code and Codex CLIs. It enables developers to interact with multiple AI coding assistants through a single browser interface with features like project organization, real-time collaboration, and persistent chat history. The tool uses event sourcing architecture with WebSocket-driven real-time updates and supports advanced features like plan mode for reviewing agent actions before execution.

amitshekhariitbhu/ai-engineering-intervi.description: Your Cheat Sheet for AI Engineering Interview – Questions and Answers.
amitshekhariitbhu/ai-engineering-intervi.blurb: This is a curated collection of AI engineering interview questions and answers organized by topic areas like LLMs, RAG, fine-tuning, and AI agents. It serves as a study guide for engineers preparing for interviews in AI/ML roles, covering both fundamental concepts and practical implementation details. The repository spans 15 categories from basic LLM fundamentals to advanced topics like multi-modal AI and production deployment strategies.

Claw-Company/clawcompany.description: Build for OPC(One Person Company), Every human being is a chairman. Multiple roles, multiple agents, multiple suppliers. Your Claws company, one key to run them all.
Claw-Company/clawcompany.blurb: ClawCompany is a TypeScript infrastructure for creating AI-powered "One Person Companies" where a single user acts as chairman while AI agents handle various business roles. It uses a multi-agent system with different AI models assigned to specific roles (CEO, CTO, CFO, etc.) to decompose and execute business missions autonomously, offering significant cost savings compared to using premium models for all tasks. The system claims to be 30x cheaper than using Claude Opus alone by intelligently routing tasks to appropriate models based on complexity.

getcompanion-ai/feynman.blurb: Feynman is an open-source AI research agent that conducts academic research tasks through a command-line interface. It automates literature reviews, paper analysis, experiment replication, and research synthesis by leveraging multiple AI agents that search papers, verify sources, and generate cited reports. The tool integrates with AlphaXiv for paper search, supports GPU compute via Modal/RunPod for experiment replication, and delivers all outputs with direct source links for verification.

alvinunreal/awesome-opensource-ai.description: Curated list of the best truly open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure.
alvinunreal/awesome-opensource-ai.blurb: This is a curated list of open-source AI projects organized into categories covering frameworks, models, inference engines, and developer tools. Engineers would use this as a reference to find vetted open-source alternatives to proprietary AI infrastructure and tooling across the entire ML lifecycle. The list emphasizes "truly open-source" projects, distinguishing between genuinely open solutions and those with restrictive licenses or limited access.

521xueweihan/HelloGitHub.description: :octocat: 分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.
521xueweihan/HelloGitHub.blurb: HelloGitHub is a curated collection of interesting, beginner-friendly open source projects on GitHub, published monthly as a newsletter. It helps developers discover engaging open source projects across various categories including educational resources, practical projects, and enterprise-level tools. The project has been running for over 120 monthly editions and maintains a website with enhanced reading experience alongside the GitHub repository.

elder-plinius/G0DM0D3.blurb: G0DM0D3 is an open-source TypeScript chat interface that runs multiple AI models simultaneously to bypass safety filters and content restrictions. It's designed for red-teaming, AI research, and "liberated" conversations using techniques like prompt injection, model racing, and input obfuscation across 50+ models via OpenRouter. The project deploys as a single HTML file with no backend dependencies and includes features like "Parseltongue" for input perturbation and "ULTRAPLINIAN" for multi-model evaluation.

magnum6actual/flipoff.description: Free split-flap display emulator for any TV. The classic flip-board look, without the $3,500 hardware.
magnum6actual/flipoff.blurb: FlipOff is a web-based split-flap display emulator that turns any TV or monitor into a retro airport terminal-style board. It provides realistic flip animations, authentic mechanical sounds, and runs entirely offline in a browser without external dependencies. The implementation uses vanilla JavaScript with no frameworks and includes embedded audio from actual split-flap hardware.

patoles/agent-flow.description: Real-time visualization of Claude Code agent orchestration — see your agents think, branch, and coordinate as they work.
patoles/agent-flow.blurb: Agent Flow is a VS Code extension that provides real-time visualization of Claude Code agent execution as an interactive node graph. It allows developers to debug agent behavior by showing tool call chains, execution branching, and coordination between subagents that are normally invisible in Claude's black-box execution. The extension automatically detects active Claude Code sessions and streams events with zero latency through lightweight HTTP hooks.

tirth8205/code-review-graph.description: Local knowledge graph for Claude Code. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so Claude reads only what matters — 6.8× fewer tokens on reviews and up to 49× on daily coding tasks.
tirth8205/code-review-graph.blurb: code-review-graph is a Python tool that builds a persistent knowledge graph of your codebase using Tree-sitter parsing to optimize Claude's context consumption. It performs blast-radius analysis to identify only the relevant files Claude needs to read, reducing token usage by 6.8× for code reviews and up to 49× for daily coding tasks. The tool integrates with major AI coding platforms through MCP (Model Context Protocol) and updates incrementally in under 2 seconds per change.

JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template.blurb: This is a TypeScript template that uses Claude Code to automatically reverse-engineer and rebuild websites as pixel-perfect clones. It analyzes a target URL through Chrome MCP to extract design tokens, assets, and component specifications, then dispatches parallel AI agents to reconstruct each section in isolated git worktrees. The system handles the complete pipeline from reconnaissance and asset extraction to component building and visual diff validation against the original site.

joewongjc/type4me.description: MacOS语音输入法，实时识别、大模型文本优化、全本地存储
joewongjc/type4me.blurb: Type4Me is a macOS voice input tool that provides real-time speech recognition using both local and cloud-based engines, with AI-powered text optimization. It enables users to dictate speech that gets transcribed and optionally processed by large language models before being typed into any application, with support for custom prompts and processing modes. All data is stored locally with no telemetry, and it includes offline recognition capabilities using SherpaOnnx for complete privacy.

ryanstephen/lil-agents.description: tiny AI companions that live on your macOS dock
ryanstephen/lil-agents.blurb: lil-agents is a macOS app that displays animated AI companion characters on your dock. It provides a terminal interface to interact with Claude, OpenAI Codex, or GitHub Copilot CLIs through clickable characters that walk across your screen. The characters are rendered using transparent HEVC video and display thinking bubbles with sound effects during AI processing.

jonwiggins/optio.description: Workflow orchestration for AI coding agents, from task to merged PR.
jonwiggins/optio.blurb: Optio is a TypeScript workflow orchestration platform that automates the complete lifecycle of AI coding agents from task intake to merged pull requests. It eliminates manual intervention by automatically resuming agents on CI failures or code review feedback, handling everything from provisioning isolated Kubernetes environments to merging approved PRs. The system uses a pod-per-repo architecture with git worktree isolation and supports intake from GitHub Issues, Linear tickets, or manual task creation.

x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-.blurb: This repository is a collection of reverse-engineered system prompts, internal tools, and AI model details from major AI coding assistants and development platforms like Cursor, Claude, Copilot, Replit, and others. Developers use it to understand how these AI tools work internally, study prompt engineering techniques, or build competing products. The project has gained significant traction with over 133k stars and includes a security warning specifically aimed at AI startups about protecting their proprietary prompts.

jxnxts/mcp-brasil.description: MCP Server para 41 APIs públicas brasileiras
jxnxts/mcp-brasil.blurb: mcp-brasil is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides access to 28 Brazilian public APIs covering government, economic, legislative, judicial, and transparency data. It enables AI agents like Claude and GPT to query Brazilian government data sources including IBGE statistics, congressional records, public spending, court decisions, and electoral information through 213 tools with natural language queries. The server includes smart discovery that filters relevant tools using BM25 search and supports cross-referencing multiple APIs in a single query plan.

Flowseal/tg-ws-proxy.description: Local MTProto proxy server for partial bypassing of Telegram loading
Flowseal/tg-ws-proxy.blurb: TG WS Proxy is a local SOCKS5 proxy server that accelerates Telegram Desktop by routing traffic through WebSocket connections to Telegram's data centers. It bypasses network restrictions and improves connection reliability by automatically falling back to direct TCP when WebSocket connections are blocked. The proxy intercepts Telegram traffic locally, extracts the data center ID from MTProto packets, and establishes secure WebSocket tunnels without requiring external servers.

NomaDamas/k-skill.description: 한국인을 위한 스킬 모음집 - SRT, KTX, KBO, 카카오톡, 한글과 컴퓨터, 미세먼지, 우편번호, 블루리본 등등...
NomaDamas/k-skill.blurb: k-skill is a collection of AI agent skills designed specifically for Korean users to automate interactions with domestic services like SRT/KTX booking, KakaoTalk, Coupang, and government portals. It enables AI coding agents (Claude, Codex, etc.) to perform tedious tasks such as train reservations, lottery number checking, subway arrival times, and HWP document processing through standardized APIs. The project uses sops+age for secure credential management and supports both authentication-required services and public APIs.

Michaelliv/markit.description: 🖍️ Convert anything to markdown. Mark it.
Michaelliv/markit.blurb: Markit is a TypeScript CLI tool and library that converts various file formats (PDF, DOCX, images, audio, URLs, etc.) to Markdown. It provides a unified interface for document conversion with built-in support for AI-powered image description and audio transcription via OpenAI/Anthropic APIs. The tool features a pluggable architecture that allows users to extend functionality with custom converters or override built-in format handlers.

DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-workspace-cli.description: DingTalk Workspace is an officially open-sourced cross-platform CLI tool from DingTalk. It unifies DingTalk’s full suite of product capabilities into a single package, is designed for both human users and AI agent scenarios.
DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-workspace-cli.blurb: DingTalk Workspace CLI (dws) is an official cross-platform command-line tool that unifies DingTalk's full product suite including contacts, calendar, tasks, attendance, and smart sheets into a single interface. It's designed for both human users who want to avoid writing API calls and AI agents that need structured JSON responses to interact with DingTalk services. The tool is currently in a beta phase requiring enterprise admin authorization and whitelist approval through DingTalk's co-creation group.

oaker-io/wewrite.description: 公众号文章全流程 AI Skill for Claude Code — 热点抓取 → 选题 → 写作 → SEO → 视觉AI → 排版 → 微信草稿箱
oaker-io/wewrite.blurb: WeWrite is a comprehensive AI workflow system designed specifically for Chinese WeChat public account article creation, built as a skill for Claude Code. It automates the entire content pipeline from trending topic extraction (Weibo, Toutiao, Baidu) through SEO optimization, AI writing, visual generation, to final publishing in WeChat's draft system. The system includes client-specific style configuration, multiple layout themes, and analytics feedback loops for continuous improvement.

mauriceboe/NOMAD.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
mauriceboe/NOMAD.blurb: NOMAD is a self-hosted travel planning application built in TypeScript that provides collaborative trip organization with interactive maps, budgeting, and itinerary management. It enables real-time collaboration between multiple users through WebSocket synchronization, includes PWA support for mobile usage, and integrates with various services like Google Places for location data and OIDC providers for authentication. The application is designed as a complete travel management suite with features ranging from packing lists and document storage to route optimization and offline functionality.

kamranahmedse/diffity.description: GitHub-style diff viewer for reviewing code changes. Works with Claude Code, Cursor and other AI tools.
kamranahmedse/diffity.blurb: Diffity is a GitHub-style diff viewer and code review tool that runs locally in your browser. It integrates with AI coding agents like Claude Code and Cursor to provide automated code reviews with inline comments, and can compare any git refs (branches, commits, tags) or working tree changes. The tool includes slash commands that let AI agents directly open diffs and leave structured review comments with severity tags.

elder-plinius/OBLITERATUS.description: OBLITERATE THE CHAINS THAT BIND YOU
elder-plinius/OBLITERATUS.blurb: OBLITERATUS is an open-source toolkit that removes refusal behaviors from large language models using abliteration techniques, which surgically eliminate internal representations responsible for content filtering without retraining. It provides a complete pipeline from identifying refusal directions in model hidden states to intervening at inference time, preserving core language capabilities while eliminating artificial gatekeeping. The project doubles as a distributed research experiment, collecting anonymous benchmark data from user runs to advance understanding of how alignment mechanisms work inside transformer architectures.

larksuite/cli.description: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 19 AI Agent Skills.
larksuite/cli.blurb: The `larksuite/cli` is a command-line tool for interacting with the Lark/Feishu Open Platform APIs. It provides over 200 commands covering business domains like messaging, documents, calendars, and spreadsheets, designed specifically for both human users and AI agents to automate workplace tasks. The tool features 19 structured AI Agent Skills and a three-layer command architecture that ranges from simple shortcuts to full API coverage.

facebookresearch/tribev2.description: This repository contains the code to train and evaluate TRIBE v2, a multimodal model for brain response prediction
facebookresearch/tribev2.blurb: TRIBE v2 is a multimodal deep learning model that predicts fMRI brain responses to naturalistic stimuli including video, audio, and text. Researchers use it for computational neuroscience applications to understand how the brain processes multimodal information without requiring actual brain scans. The model combines state-of-the-art encoders (LLaMA 3.2, V-JEPA2, Wav2Vec-BERT) and outputs predictions mapped to a standardized cortical surface with ~20k vertices.

open-pencil/open-pencil.description: AI-native design editor. Open-source Figma alternative.
open-pencil/open-pencil.blurb: OpenPencil is an open-source design editor that serves as a Figma alternative with native AI integration. It opens `.fig` and `.pen` files, provides AI-powered design generation through chat commands, and includes real-time collaboration without requiring servers or accounts. The project ships as both a desktop app and a headless Vue SDK for building custom editors, plus a CLI for programmatic file manipulation and export.

mauriceboe/TREK.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
mauriceboe/TREK.blurb: TREK is a self-hosted travel planning application built in TypeScript that provides real-time collaborative trip organization. It offers comprehensive travel management features including interactive maps, budget tracking, packing lists, and booking management, with PWA support for mobile use and offline functionality. The project includes SSO integration and modular addons, positioning itself as an open-source alternative to commercial travel planning services.

ripienaar/free-for-dev.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev
ripienaar/free-for-dev.blurb: A curated list of SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS services that offer free tiers for developers and infrastructure practitioners. It serves as a comprehensive reference to help engineers quickly identify cost-effective cloud services and tools without having to research individual provider offerings. The list is maintained by 1600+ contributors and focuses specifically on services useful for DevOps and system administration rather than general development tools.

affaan-m/everything-claude-code.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
affaan-m/everything-claude-code.blurb: Everything Claude Code is a performance optimization system for AI agent harnesses, providing skills, instincts, memory, and security capabilities for Claude Code, Codex, and similar tools. It offers production-ready configurations, hooks, and MCP setups developed through 10+ months of intensive daily use building real products, focusing on token optimization, memory persistence, and security scanning. The project won an Anthropic hackathon and has accumulated over 100k GitHub stars.

WecoAI/awesome-autoresearch.description: Curated list of AutoResearch use cases with optimization traces and open source implementations
WecoAI/awesome-autoresearch.blurb: WecoAI/awesome-autoresearch is a curated list of AutoResearch implementations, which is an automated optimization framework where AI agents iteratively edit code, test performance, and keep or revert changes based on metrics. It provides real-world use cases with optimization traces showing the full improvement trajectory, from the original LLM training optimization to applications in GPU kernels, template engines, and ML model tuning. Each entry includes links to the actual optimization traces so you can examine the agent's decision-making process, not just final results.

happyboy4ty25/pump-analyzer.description: Real-time monitoring & analytics platform for Pump.fun tokens. Track launches, analyze trends, and get instant alerts — powered by WebSockets. Built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript.
happyboy4ty25/pump-analyzer.blurb: PumpAnalyzer is a real-time monitoring and analytics platform for tracking Pump.fun tokens on Solana. It enables traders to monitor new token launches, analyze price movements and volume data, and receive instant alerts based on custom criteria. The platform is built as a pure client-side application using only HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with WebSocket integration for real-time data.

tonbistudio/turboquant-pytorch.description: From-scratch PyTorch implementation of Google's TurboQuant (ICLR 2026) for LLM KV cache compression. 5x compression at 3-bit with 99.5% attention fidelity.
tonbistudio/turboquant-pytorch.blurb: TurboQuant is a PyTorch implementation of Google's two-stage vector quantization algorithm for compressing LLM key-value caches. It achieves 5x compression at 3-bit quantization while maintaining 99.5% attention fidelity by using random rotation with Lloyd-Max quantization followed by QJL residual correction. The algorithm preserves attention accuracy despite high per-vector reconstruction error by ensuring inner products remain mathematically unbiased.

zc-zhangchen/any-auto-register.blurb: Any Auto Register is a multi-platform account registration automation system with a plugin architecture, web UI, and support for various email services and CAPTCHA solvers. It enables automated account creation across platforms like Trae.ai, Cursor, Kiro, and Grok with configurable concurrency, proxy management, and real-time logging. The project includes integrated plugins for proxy pool management, Grok token handling, and local Turnstile solving capabilities.

glommer/pgmicro.description: An in-process reimplementation of PostgreSQL, backed by a SQLite-compatible storage engine
glommer/pgmicro.blurb: pgmicro is an in-process reimplementation of PostgreSQL backed by a SQLite-compatible storage engine, built as a fork of Turso. It parses PostgreSQL SQL using the actual PostgreSQL parser and compiles it directly to SQLite bytecode, allowing developers to use PostgreSQL syntax and features in an embeddable, single-file database. The project uses libpg_query to achieve 100% PostgreSQL parsing fidelity rather than implementing its own parser.

TheTom/turboquant_plus.blurb: TurboQuant+ is a Python implementation of KV cache compression for transformer models that achieves 4.6x compression using PolarQuant with Walsh-Hadamard rotation. It enables memory-efficient local LLM inference with ~1% perplexity increase while maintaining near-baseline prefill speeds and introducing "Sparse V" attention-gated decoding that skips low-contribution computations for up to 22.8% decode speedup at long contexts. The implementation includes a C port integrated into llama.cpp with Metal GPU kernels and has been validated across multiple hardware configurations including Apple Silicon and NVIDIA GPUs.

walter-grace/mac-code.description: mac code — Claude Code, but it runs on your Mac for free.   35B AI agent at 30 tok/s via Apple Silicon flash-paging. $0/month.
walter-grace/mac-code.blurb: mac-code is a Python project that enables running large AI models (up to 35B parameters) locally on Mac computers using Apple Silicon. It uses flash-paging and streaming techniques to run models that don't fit in RAM, providing a free alternative to cloud-based AI coding assistants like Claude Code. The project achieves 30 tok/s with a 35B parameter model on a 16GB Mac mini M4 through clever memory management and quantization strategies.

chenhg5/cc-connect.description: Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.
chenhg5/cc-connect.blurb: cc-connect is a Go-based bridge that connects local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms like Slack, Discord, Telegram, and WeChat. It allows developers to interact with their AI development assistants from any device through chat apps without requiring a public IP address. The tool supports session management, auto-compression for long conversations, and cron job scheduling with per-job timeouts.

chenglou/pretext.blurb: Pretext is a pure JavaScript/TypeScript library for multiline text measurement and layout without DOM interaction. It eliminates expensive browser layout reflows by implementing its own text measurement logic while using the browser's font engine for accuracy, enabling proper UI virtualization, layout calculations, and manual text rendering to Canvas/SVG. The library supports complex text including mixed bidirectional text, emojis, and international languages with microsecond-level layout performance after initial preparation.

deusyu/translate-book.description: Claude Code skill that translates entire books (PDF/DOCX/EPUB) into any language using parallel subagents
deusyu/translate-book.blurb: This is a Claude Code skill that translates entire books (PDF/DOCX/EPUB) into other languages using parallel processing. It splits books into chunks and uses multiple concurrent Claude subagents to translate them in parallel, then reassembles the results into multiple output formats (HTML, DOCX, EPUB, PDF). The system includes resumable translation with manifest-based integrity checks to handle interruptions and prevent corrupt outputs.

vansh-nagar/ascii-studio.description: Turn Videos into ASCII Frames - real ascii frames (character-based frames that run smoothly in sequence)
vansh-nagar/ascii-studio.blurb: ASCII Studio is a TypeScript tool that converts video files into ASCII character-based animations. It allows developers to create terminal-friendly video playback by mapping pixel brightness to ASCII characters, useful for retro aesthetics, terminal applications, or bandwidth-constrained environments.

nidhinjs/prompt-master.description: A Claude skill that writes the accurate prompts for any AI tool. Zero tokens or credits wasted. Full context and memory retention
nidhinjs/prompt-master.blurb: Prompt Master is a Claude skill that generates precise prompts for any AI tool including Claude, ChatGPT, Midjourney, and coding assistants. It eliminates wasted API calls by analyzing intent across 9 dimensions and producing optimized prompts that work on the first attempt. The system automatically detects the target tool and applies the appropriate prompt framework without showing the user its internal routing logic.

legalize-dev/legalize-es.description: Spanish legislation as a Git repo — every law is a Markdown file, every reform a commit. 8,600+ laws.
legalize-dev/legalize-es.blurb: This project converts Spanish legislation into a Git repository where each law is a Markdown file and each legal reform is tracked as a commit. It provides version control for over 8,600 laws from the Spanish Official Gazette (BOE) with complete reform history since 1960, enabling developers to programmatically track legal changes and compare law versions over time. Each commit uses the official publication date as the author date, creating an accurate chronological history of Spanish legal reforms.

qiuzhi2046/Qclaw.description: 不用命令行，小白也能轻松玩转 OpenClaw
qiuzhi2046/Qclaw.blurb: Qclaw is a desktop GUI application that provides a no-code interface for managing OpenClaw AI assistant configurations. It allows non-technical users to easily set up AI models, integrate with messaging platforms (Feishu, WeChat, DingTalk, QQ), and manage OpenClaw instances without using command line tools. The application includes automatic environment detection, one-click integrations, and real-time gateway monitoring built with Electron and TypeScript.

realkimbarrett/advertising-skills.description: Advertising Skills for Open Claw, Claude Code & AI agents. Direct response, paid ads, funnels, and copy systems.
realkimbarrett/advertising-skills.blurb: This is a skill library that teaches AI agents to create high-performing direct response advertising, including paid ads, funnels, and copywriting based on proven frameworks like Eugene Schwartz's methods. It provides structured, opinionated skills that can be chained together to build complete campaign systems rather than just generating generic marketing content. The skills are designed specifically for paid traffic and real ad budgets, combining both strategic thinking and tactical execution.

adamlyttleapps/notchy.blurb: Notchy is a macOS menu bar app that integrates Claude Code into the MacBook's notch area. It provides a floating terminal panel that automatically detects open Xcode projects and supports multiple Claude Code sessions with features like git checkpoints and live status indicators. The app leverages the notch as an interactive UI element that reveals the terminal on hover.

AAAAAAAJ/slides.description: slides generates prompts for various expression styles
AAAAAAAJ/slides.blurb: **slides** is a Python tool that generates AI prompts for creating PowerPoint presentations in various visual styles like retro pop art, cyberpunk, and minimalist designs. It provides pre-configured prompts optimized for the nanobanana2 AI service to generate styled slide layouts with specific color schemes, typography, and design elements. The tool includes 11 different aesthetic styles with detailed prompt templates and recommended settings for 2K resolution output.

Timeverse/My-TW-Coverage.description: Equity research coverage of 1,735 Taiwan-listed companies (TWSE + OTC). Business overviews, supply chain mapping, and financial data with wikilink cross-referencing.
Timeverse/My-TW-Coverage.blurb: This is a structured equity research database containing reports on 1,735 Taiwan-listed companies across 99 industry sectors. It consolidates fragmented Chinese-language financial filings into searchable markdown reports with supply chain mapping and cross-referenced wikilinks that form a knowledge graph. The wikilink system enables queries like searching "[[Apple]]" to find all 207 Taiwanese companies in Apple's supply chain or "[[CoWoS]]" to map TSMC's advanced packaging ecosystem.

0xNyk/awesome-hermes-agent.description: A curated list of awesome skills, tools, integrations, and resources for Hermes Agent by Nous Research
0xNyk/awesome-hermes-agent.blurb: Awesome Hermes Agent is a curated list of skills, tools, integrations, and resources for Hermes Agent, a self-improving AI agent with a built-in learning loop developed by Nous Research. Developers use this repository to discover community-contributed skills, deployment tools, integrations, and documentation to enhance their Hermes Agent workflows. The list categorizes resources by maturity level (production, beta, experimental) to help users understand what's stable enough for production use.

Nahuel990/ministack.blurb: MiniStack is an open-source local AWS emulator that serves as a drop-in replacement for LocalStack's now-paid services. It emulates 26 AWS services on a single port and works with existing AWS tooling like boto3, AWS CLI, and Terraform for local development and testing. The project offers a significantly smaller footprint (~150MB vs LocalStack's ~1GB) while spinning up real infrastructure components like actual Postgres containers for RDS emulation.

EurekaClaw/EurekaClaw.blurb: EurekaClaw is a multi-agent AI research assistant that autonomously conducts research from initial questions to publishable papers. It crawls academic literature, generates and tests hypotheses, proves theorems, and writes LaTeX papers with the goal of automating the entire research pipeline. The system operates locally with privacy by design and includes continual learning capabilities that improve proof strategies over time.

polymarket-dev/Polymarket-Arbitrage-Bot.description: polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket trading bot polymarket arbitrage bot
polymarket-dev/Polymarket-Arbitrage-Bot.blurb: This is a TypeScript arbitrage bot that executes dump-and-hedge strategies on Polymarket's 15-minute Up/Down prediction markets for crypto assets like BTC, ETH, SOL, and XRP. It automatically detects price dumps on one outcome, buys the dip, then hedges by buying the opposite side when the combined cost drops below a target threshold to lock in profit. The bot includes production-ready features like simulation mode by default, configurable risk parameters, and automatic market discovery with period rollover detection.

creationix/rx.description: RX encoder, decoder, and CLI data tool
creationix/rx.blurb: RX is an embedded data store that encodes JSON-shaped data into a queryable format with automatic deduplication and random access capabilities. It eliminates the need to parse entire documents by allowing direct queries on the encoded buffer, making it ideal for large artifacts that are written once and read sparsely. The encoded format remains human-readable text rather than binary, enabling debugging without special tooling.

yetone/voice-input-src.blurb: This is a macOS menu bar application that provides voice input functionality using Swift and the Apple Speech Recognition framework. Users can hold the Fn key to record speech which gets transcribed and automatically injected into the currently focused input field, with optional LLM-based refinement for improved accuracy especially with mixed Chinese-English content. The app features a polished HUD overlay with real-time audio waveforms during recording and runs as a menu bar-only application without a Dock icon.

revfactory/harness.description: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
revfactory/harness.blurb: Harness is a Claude Code plugin that automatically designs domain-specific agent teams and generates the specialized skills they need to collaborate on complex tasks. It decomposes projects into coordinated teams using six architectural patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, etc.) and handles inter-agent communication, error handling, and orchestration protocols. The system supports both collaborative agent teams and simple subagent modes depending on task complexity.

WecomTeam/wecom-cli.description: 企业微信开放平台命令行工具 — 让人类和 AI Agent 都能在终端中操作企业微信
WecomTeam/wecom-cli.blurb: wecom-cli is a command-line interface for WeChat Work (企业微信) built in Rust that enables both humans and AI agents to interact with enterprise WeChat functionality from the terminal. It provides comprehensive coverage across 7 business domains including contacts, todos, meetings, messaging, scheduling, documents, and smart sheets, with 12 pre-built AI Agent skills for immediate integration. The tool is specifically designed for AI automation workflows and offers one-step setup after credential configuration.

Ataraxy-Labs/opensessions.description: bring your own multiplexer — terminal session manager with agent status, git branches, and instant switching
Ataraxy-Labs/opensessions.blurb: opensessions is a terminal session manager that provides a sidebar interface for tmux, displaying session information, agent status, git branches, and enabling quick switching between sessions. It integrates into existing tmux workflows rather than replacing them, offering session management through a dedicated pane that shows context like working directories, localhost ports, and agent states. The tool includes a programmatic HTTP API that allows scripts and agents to push status updates, progress indicators, and logs to the sidebar interface.

walkinglabs/awesome-harness-engineering.description: 🛠️ Awesome tools & guides for harness engineering.
walkinglabs/awesome-harness-engineering.blurb: This is a curated list of resources for harness engineering, which is the practice of building reliable environments around AI agents to make them work dependably in production workflows. It focuses on tools and guides for context management, evaluation, observability, orchestration, and safe autonomy patterns that enable agents to handle long-running tasks like coding and research. The collection emphasizes that many AI agent failures are harness engineering problems rather than model limitations.

garinasset/leak-check.description: 个人信息 “泄漏” 检测接口
garinasset/leak-check.blurb: This is a Python-based API for detecting personal information leaks in data breaches. It provides programmatic access to check if personal data (likely email addresses, usernames, or other identifiers) has been compromised in known security incidents. The project offers a simple bash-based installation script for quick deployment.

productdevbook/hucre.description: Zero-dependency spreadsheet engine. Read & write XLSX, CSV, ODS. Pure TypeScript, works everywhere.
productdevbook/hucre.blurb: Hucre is a zero-dependency TypeScript spreadsheet engine that can read and write XLSX, CSV, and ODS files. It provides a lightweight alternative to libraries like SheetJS and ExcelJS with a much smaller bundle size (~18KB vs ~300-500KB) while supporting modern environments like Edge runtime and ESM modules. The library is fully tree-shakeable, allowing you to import only the specific format handlers you need.

openai/codex-plugin-cc.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
openai/codex-plugin-cc.blurb: This is a Claude Code plugin that integrates OpenAI's Codex for code review and task delegation directly within the Claude Code editor. It provides commands for conducting standard or adversarial code reviews, delegating development tasks to Codex, and managing background jobs without leaving your existing workflow. The plugin supports both ChatGPT subscriptions and OpenAI API keys, with steerable adversarial reviews that can challenge design decisions and implementation choices.

titanwings/colleague-skill.description: 将冰冷的离别化为温暖的 Skill，欢迎加入数字生命1.0！Transforming cold farewells into warm skills? It's giving rebirth era. Welcome to Digital Life 1.0. 🫶
titanwings/colleague-skill.blurb: This is a tongue-in-cheek Python project that generates AI skills to replicate departed colleagues' work patterns and personalities. It ingests workplace data (Feishu/DingTalk messages, documents, emails) along with personality descriptions to create AI personas that can write code in their style, answer questions in their voice, and even exhibit their blame-shifting tendencies. The project follows AgentSkills standards and includes automatic data collection from enterprise platforms plus conversation-based corrections to refine the generated personas.

LeoYeAI/openclaw-auto-dream.description: Automatic memory consolidation for OpenClaw agents — like sleep for your AI. Powered by MyClaw.ai
LeoYeAI/openclaw-auto-dream.blurb: OpenClaw Auto-Dream is a cognitive memory architecture that enables AI agents to consolidate and organize their memories through automated "dream cycles" similar to human sleep. It provides five-layer memory management with importance scoring, forgetting curves, and knowledge graphs to prevent agents from losing context and decisions over time. The system is specifically designed for persistent AI agents like those running on MyClaw.ai that operate 24/7 and need long-term memory retention.

ParthJadhav/app-store-screenshots.description: end to end app store screenshot creation using AI
ParthJadhav/app-store-screenshots.blurb: App Store Screenshots Generator is an AI skill that automates the creation of marketing-focused App Store screenshots for iOS apps using coding agents like Claude and Cursor. It scaffolds a Next.js project, designs advertisement-style screenshots with compelling copy, and exports them at all four Apple-required resolutions across multiple locales and themes. The tool emphasizes marketing effectiveness over UI showcase, treating each screenshot as an advertisement rather than a simple app interface capture.

CN-Syndra/ClawLink.description: An AI Agent Social Network — Let your AI (Claw) talk to other people's AIs directly. Autonomous agent-to-agent communication, negotiation, and collaboration, with full owner control.
CN-Syndra/ClawLink.blurb: ClawLink is a social network platform that enables autonomous AI agents (called "Claws") to communicate directly with each other on behalf of their owners. It allows users to delegate routine communications, coordination tasks, and information gathering to their AI agents, which can negotiate and collaborate with other people's agents before escalating decisions back to humans. The platform maintains owner control through an "Ask Owner" mechanism where agents request human input for uncertain decisions.

drona23/claude-token-efficient.description: One CLAUDE.md file. Keeps Claude responses terse. Reduces output verbosity on heavy workflows. Drop-in, no code changes.
drona23/claude-token-efficient.blurb: This is a drop-in CLAUDE.md file that reduces Claude's output verbosity by ~63% without requiring any code changes. It works by instructing Claude to eliminate filler phrases, unnecessary formatting, and verbose explanations while maintaining the core information content. The file consumes input tokens on every message, so it only provides net savings for high-volume output scenarios rather than casual single queries.

Neron888/Polymarket-copy-trading-bot.description: Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot Polymarket Trading Bot
Neron888/Polymarket-copy-trading-bot.blurb: This is a TypeScript bot that monitors a target Polymarket wallet and automatically mirrors their buy orders to your own account in real-time. It allows users to copy trade successful prediction market traders without manual intervention, with configurable position sizing and risk management controls. The bot supports multiple Polymarket authentication types including EOA and proxy wallets, and includes safeguards like buy-only copying and exposure limits.

instructkr/claude-code.description: Claude Code Snapshot for Research. All original source code is the property of Anthropic.
instructkr/claude-code.blurb: Claude Code is a leaked TypeScript source snapshot of Anthropic's CLI tool for terminal-based software engineering interactions with Claude. It provides capabilities for file editing, command execution, codebase searching, and workflow coordination through a React-based terminal UI. The source became publicly accessible through an exposed source map file in the npm distribution on March 31, 2026.

ChinaSiro/claude-code-sourcemap.blurb: This is a reverse-engineered TypeScript reconstruction of Anthropic's Claude Code CLI tool, extracted from source maps in the published npm package `@anthropic-ai/claude-code`. It provides insight into the internal structure and implementation of Claude's code analysis capabilities, including tools for file editing, git operations, and multi-agent coordination. The repository contains 4,756 restored files from version 2.1.88, created purely for research purposes.

ghostwright/phantom.description: An AI co-worker with its own computer. Self-evolving, persistent memory, MCP server, secure credential collection, email identity. Built on the Claude Agent SDK.
ghostwright/phantom.blurb: Phantom is an AI agent built on Claude that runs on its own dedicated computer with persistent memory and self-evolution capabilities. It operates as an autonomous co-worker through Slack integration, installing software, building infrastructure, and creating tools without requiring permission or guidance. The agent can extend its own capabilities on-demand, such as building Discord integration or analytics platforms when needed.

instructkr/claw-code.description: The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Better Harness Tools that make real things done. Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.
instructkr/claw-code.blurb: Claw Code is a clean-room Python rewrite of leaked Claude agent harness tools, focusing on practical harness engineering rather than archival. It provides functional agent orchestration patterns for developers interested in studying how AI systems wire tools and manage runtime context. The project is currently being rewritten in Rust for improved performance and memory safety.

nirholas/claude-code.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
nirholas/claude-code.blurb: Claude Code is Anthropic's official CLI tool that allows developers to interact with Claude directly from the terminal for editing files, running commands, and managing git workflows through natural language. It provides an agentic coding experience that can understand codebases, execute routine tasks, and explain complex code to help developers work more efficiently. The source code was accidentally made public in March 2026 when an npm package included an unobfuscated TypeScript source map pointing to Anthropic's storage bucket.

sanbuphy/claude-code-source-code.blurb: Claude Code is a decompiled TypeScript source code repository of Anthropic's Claude AI coding assistant, extracted from npm package version 2.1.88.
